query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `parties` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `sigla` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `nome` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `numero` smallint,
  `cor` varchar(7) DEFAULT '#888888',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `parties_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `parties_sigla_unique` UNIQUE(`sigla`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `municipalities` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `codigoIbge` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `nome` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `uf` varchar(2) NOT NULL,
  `regiao` varchar(20),
  `lat` decimal(10,7),
  `lng` decimal(10,7),
  CONSTRAINT `municipalities_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`),
  CONSTRAINT `municipalities_codigoIbge_unique` UNIQUE(`codigoIbge`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `candidates` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `sequencial` varchar(20),
  `nome` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `nomeUrna` varchar(100),
  `numero` varchar(10),
  `partidoSigla` varchar(20),
  `uf` varchar(2),
  `cargo` varchar(50),
  `ano` smallint NOT NULL,
  `situacao` varchar(100),
  `genero` varchar(20),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `candidates_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `election_results_by_uf` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `ano` smallint NOT NULL,
  `turno` tinyint NOT NULL,
  `uf` varchar(2) NOT NULL,
  `cargo` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `partidoSigla` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `candidatoNome` varchar(200),
  `candidatoSequencial` varchar(20),
  `totalVotos` bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `totalVotosBranco` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalVotosNulos` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalVotosValidos` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalComparecimento` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalAbstencoes` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `percentualVotos` decimal(8,4),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `election_results_by_uf_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `election_results_by_municipality` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `ano` smallint NOT NULL,
  `turno` tinyint NOT NULL,
  `uf` varchar(2) NOT NULL,
  `codigoMunicipio` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `nomeMunicipio` varchar(200) NOT NULL,
  `cargo` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `partidoSigla` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `candidatoNome` varchar(200),
  `candidatoSequencial` varchar(20),
  `totalVotos` bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `totalVotosBranco` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalVotosNulos` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalVotosValidos` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `percentualVotos` decimal(8,4),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `election_results_by_municipality_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `election_results_by_zone` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `ano` smallint NOT NULL,
  `turno` tinyint NOT NULL,
  `uf` varchar(2) NOT NULL,
  `codigoMunicipio` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `nomeMunicipio` varchar(200),
  `numeroZona` varchar(10) NOT NULL,
  `cargo` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `partidoSigla` varchar(20) NOT NULL,
  `candidatoNome` varchar(200),
  `totalVotos` bigint NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,
  `percentualVotos` decimal(8,4),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `election_results_by_zone_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `election_summary` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
  `ano` smallint NOT NULL,
  `turno` tinyint NOT NULL,
  `uf` varchar(2),
  `cargo` varchar(50) NOT NULL,
  `totalEleitores` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalComparecimento` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalAbstencoes` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalVotosBranco` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalVotosNulos` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `totalVotosValidos` bigint DEFAULT 0,
  `percentualComparecimento` decimal(8,4),
  `percentualAbstencao` decimal(8,4),
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT (now()),
  CONSTRAINT `election_summary_id` PRIMARY KEY(`id`)
);

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_candidates_partido` ON `candidates` (`partidoSigla`);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_candidates_uf_ano` ON `candidates` (`uf`,`ano`);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_candidates_nome` ON `candidates` (`nome`);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_mun_results_ano_turno` ON `election_results_by_municipality` (`ano`,`turno`);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_mun_results_uf` ON `election_results_by_municipality` (`uf`);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_mun_results_partido` ON `election_results_by_municipality` (`partidoSigla`);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_mun_results_cargo` ON `election_results_by_municipality` (`cargo`);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_mun_results_municipio` ON `election_results_by_municipality` (`codigoMunicipio`);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_uf_results_ano_turno` ON `election_results_by_uf` (`ano`,`turno`);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_uf_results_uf` ON `election_results_by_uf` (`uf`);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_uf_results_partido` ON `election_results_by_uf` (`partidoSigla`);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_uf_results_cargo` ON `election_results_by_uf` (`cargo`);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_zone_results_ano_uf` ON `election_results_by_zone` (`ano`,`uf`);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_zone_results_partido` ON `election_results_by_zone` (`partidoSigla`);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_summary_ano_turno` ON `election_summary` (`ano`,`turno`);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_summary_uf` ON `election_summary` (`uf`);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS `idx_municipalities_uf` ON `municipalities` (`uf`);

CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `election_summary` (
  `id` int AUTO_INCREMENT NOT NULL,
